experiment_title: Mg(OH)₂在蒸馏水与稀盐酸中的溶解性比较实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Mg(OH)₂在蒸馏水与稀盐酸中的溶解性比较实验" goal="比较Mg(OH)₂在蒸馏水和稀盐酸中的溶解性，并观察其变化现象" difficulty="Easy" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="tube_clamp_1" type="test_tube_clamp" />
      <Component id="tube_clamp_2" type="test_tube_clamp" />
      <Component id="dropper_water" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_acid" type="dropper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Mg(OH)2" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Dilute_HCl" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="Mg(OH)2" mass="0.2g" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="Mg(OH)2" mass="0.2g" id="step_1" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="tube_clamp_1" id="step_2" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_2" support="tube_clamp_2" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="H2O" volume="2.5 mL" tool="dropper_water" id="step_4" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_5" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_7" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="HCl" volume="2.5 mL" tool="dropper_acid" id="step_8" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_9" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_2" id="step_10" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_11" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 将Mg(OH)₂分别加入两支试管，并将试管固定在试管夹上，为后续实验做准备。
向第一支试管中加入蒸馏水，静置并搅拌，观察Mg(OH)₂在水中的溶解情况。
向第二支试管中加入稀盐酸，静置并搅拌，观察Mg(OH)₂在酸中的溶解情况。
